name: Because the Side of Justice Will Be Whichever Side Wins!!
effect: [Counter] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +3000 power during this battle.
trigger: [Trigger] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
